fields.title: Beads commands should respect expand/collapse like other tools
fields.description:
Beads (bd) commands are always expanded, showing full output immediately. They should behave like other tools - show short summary by default (first 10 items) and only expand to show full details when user presses Ctrl+O.

Current behavior:
- `bd create`, `bd show`, `bd update`, `bd close`, etc. always show full expanded output
- Other tools like `agent` show collapsed by default with expand
fields.acceptance_criteria:
- All beads commands (show, create, update, close, etc.) display collapsed by default when run
- Collapsed view shows first 10 issues with …
fields.close_reason: Fixed: changed 9 beads commands (show, create, update, close, reopen, defer, undefer, pin, unpin) from hardcoded { expanded: true } to respect options parameter. Typecheck passed.
